NEW-D1: Invoice generate routes to SERVER-PDF (no signers + SERVER_TYPE_MAP) and sets cross-origin storage.googleapis.com/pdf-renders URL as nbdv-iframe src -> Chrome shows 'This page has been blocked by Chrome', preview blank. Violates PR#594 srcdoc rule (server PDF must be Download-only). Sandbox without allow-same-origin contributes.
Warranty Certificate: fill modal (8 fields) -> Generate -> SRCDOC sandboxed preview renders branded cert (visual verified).

NEW-D3: 'Blank' button does not exist anywhere in the rendered DOM (zero buttons inside .tl-doc-row), but the page header copy still instructs 'Use the Blank button to print an empty copy for hand-fill'. Control missing + stale copy.
Empty-state 'OPEN PIPELINE ->' navigates to #/crm.
Cancel closes the upload modal.
Document Name input accepts text.
Category select has the 6 expected options and is settable.
Upload-zone clickProxy fires a click on #docFileInput (verified via capture-trap; OS picker suppressed with preventDefault).
Actual file attach requires the native OS file picker — not automatable here. Proxy wiring to the input verified (d5-039).
Upload Document without a file validation-blocks with toast 'Add a name and select a file'; modal stays open. Real upload boundary not crossed (no file).
Auto-fill from Lead populates per-template fields (homeownerName filled from selected lead; 23 leads listed).
Per-template fill fields render for all 23 types (1-15 fields each) and accept typed + autofilled values.
Close (closeFillModal) removes the fill modal.
Generate submit verified across all 23 types (20 srcdoc previews + 3 server-PDF FAILs logged separately).

NEW-D2: 'Save to Customer' from the template library is a SILENT NO-OP that still toasts 'Document saved'. Root cause: _docgenSubmit assembles only field values — never data.leadId from the Auto-fill lead select — so _leadIdEarly is null and _persistPromise never runs (verified: leads/{id}/documents stayed empty after lead-selected generates). handleSave then toasts success around a no-op onSave.

Email = location.href='mailto:?subject=...' (compose-only, no auto-send; handler wired in nbd-doc-viewer.js handleEmail). Not fired: mailto triggers Chrome's native external-protocol dialog which can wedge CDP. No way to stub window.location.
Print fired: posts print message into sandboxed iframe + opens print window (window.open recorded by stub; native dialog suppressed).

Download PDF produced a real client-side PDF via lazy html2pdf (spy captured 19,016-byte application/pdf blob; file write suppressed). NOTE: rasterization keeps the renderer busy ~45s+ on an 89KB doc — tooling note, possibly user-visible jank.

Send-for-Signature is structurally unreachable from the template library: onSendForSignature requires hasSigners && leadId, but this path never sets data.signers nor data.leadId (see NEW-D2). Signature flows live in lead-context preflight (doc-preflight.js) / estimate e-sign — test there (gap-esign rows).

Sig-block Clear lives inside signer-enabled docs only (template-library docs never have signers) and inside a sandboxed opaque-origin iframe. Covered by signature-integration PR3a/b tests; unreachable on this surface.
Sig-block Undo — same unreachability as d5-051.
Sig-block Use-saved — same unreachability as d5-051.
doc-action-bar Print lives in the standalone Blank-print window; the Blank button is missing (d5-034 FAIL) so this window is unreachable.
doc-action-bar Close — same unreachability as d5-054.
